caption: A person is crafting a greeting card on a white gridded cutting mat. In the first frame, the person's hands are positioned over a brown piece of cardstock, with a green cardbase nearby that features a brown vertical stripe. A small white rectangle and pieces of floral patterned paper are also on the mat. An ink pad labeled "MEMEN" and a stamp with text including "BIRTHDAY" and "Best things!" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the person uses a clear adhesive roller to apply glue to the brown cardstock. In the final frame, the person slides the brown piece of cardstock toward the green cardbase. The person wears a ring on their left hand and a black smartwatch on their left wrist. The watermark "Stamping Jill" appears in the lower-left corner of the scene.
